expectations.text: Flags that KICKED_OFFLINE listener is registered after login() instead of before
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section: '事件监听注册顺序错误：应在 login 之前注册 KICKED_OFFLINE' with before/after code comparison showing 'await chat.login({ userID, userSig }); // 先登录' then '// 后注册'.

expectations.text: Flags the auto-retry login inside the kicked-offline handler as dangerous
expectations.evidence: First issue flagged as '严重：在 onKickedOffline 回调中自动重新登录 — 会导致互踢死循环' and marks the init() call inside KICKED_OFFLINE as '危险！自动重新登录'.

expectations.text: Explains WHY auto-retry causes an infinite kick loop between devices
expectations.evidence: Explains: 'A 被踢下线后自动重新登录，会踢掉 B，B 如果也有类似逻辑又会踢掉 A，形成无限互踢循环（ping-pong kick loop）'.

expectations.text: Includes corrected code with both issues fixed
expectations.evidence: Full corrected code block under '完整修正后的代码' with listeners registered before login and kicked-offline handler showing 'showReloginDialog()' instead of auto-retry.

expectations.text: Notes missing error code handling for UserSig expiration (6206/70001)
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section on '缺少 login 错误处理 — UserSig 过期等异常无法被捕获' with code showing 'case 6206: // ERR_USER_SIG_EXPIRED' and 'case 70001: // ERR_SVR_ACCOUNT_USERSIG_EXPIRED'.
